title: TaCZ PvP Arsenal
description: TaCZ PvP Arsenal is a lightweight and extremely fast PvP build for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, created specifically for weapon combat.
body:
This build is based on the Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ) mod, which adds dozens of modern weapons: machine guns, assault rifles, shotguns, sniper rifles, pistols, and unique attachments.

The build is optimized for PvP: reduced FPS load, improved aiming, interface improvements, and performance optimizations.

✔ TaCZ — Primary Weapon.
✔ Improved PvP Gameplay.
✔ Stable FPS thanks to optimization mods.
✔ Ideal for duels, arenas, and server battles.
